title: Gooey Indulgent Egyptian Tomato Bowl
description: A rich and satisfying Egyptian-inspired dish featuring gooey tomato ketchup and crispy vegetables.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the earthenware bowl over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger, cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the blanched sprouts, cumin powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper, stir to combine.
Pour in the homemade or store-bought tomato ketchup, and stir to combine.
Transfer the bowl to the preheated oven, and bake for 15 minutes, until the ketchup is bubbly and slightly caramelized.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley, and serve hot.
Let the dish rest for 2 minutes before serving, to allow the juices to redistribute.
